programme.title: Why Chernobyl Still Isn't Over - 40 Years After The Worst Nuclear Disaster
programme.desc: On April 26, 1986, Reactor 4 at Chernobyl exploded, triggering the worst nuclear disaster in history. Forty years later, the exclusion zone remains too radioactive for human life, and the catastrophe's impact continues to ripple across Europe and beyond.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Climate change is our defining crisis, and it is happening even faster than we thought. But we're not powerless to stop it. The impacts of climate change are felt in every corner of the world. Increased temperatures are causing environmental disasters. The sea levels are rising, the Arctic is melting, coral reefs are dying, oceans are acidifying, and forests are burning. It is clear that business as usual is not an option. With climate change reaching irreversible heights, now is the time for bold collective action. The climate emergency is a race we are losing, but it is a race we can win.

programme.title: E8 - Eco Innovators
programme.desc: Eco-innovators introduce Zac and Darin to unique and cost-effective ways to address complex problems and help heal the environment.

programme.title: E5 - Singapore
programme.desc: Jack cooks his dad’s steak and kidney pudding recipe at home in Cornwall, before taking it to Singapore. He makes a deconstructed version of the traditional British dish.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: The Legendary Ironfan
programme.desc: Regal Academy faces Shan Academy in a track-and-field competition. Hawk, Travis, and Astoria are beaten by LingLing, Princess IronFan's granddaughter. Rose must find LingLing's weakness: a love of frilly dresses, to save the day.

programme.title: Drones
programme.desc: It's Carol's birthday and her famous cake is a hit-except Motor's not there. He's sent a drone instead. Just a phase, says Albert. But when Naomi, Flippy, and Robbie show up as drones too, things spiral fast. The world's going drone, and Carol wants to hide from it all!

programme.title: Three, Two, One Blast Off
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts build a three-stage rocket to send a camera high above the clouds to photograph Matariki.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met.....a Sink
programme.desc: Henry goes into the bathroom to wash his hands and meets a Sink. Tap offers to wash Henry's hands but no water comes out of his spout!

programme.title: Kazoo
programme.desc: Play your funky music and feel the sound waves with this scientific instrument.

programme.title: The Dark Orca
programme.desc: The Dark Orca pirates attack! They believe the Nektons have a rare treasure aboard their submarine.

programme.title: Magic 9's
programme.desc: In this episode, mathemagician Eric reveals a cool math trick that illustrates the special properties of the number 9. Follow a given sequence ... multiply by three, add three, multiply by three, and then add two digits. What just happened?! It's not magic ... it's math!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Tshavhadzimu
programme.desc: Four young adventurers travel to Tshavhadzimu in Mapungubwe National Park. They search for a cave with rock art, run into a herd of elephants and almost step on a dangerous snake.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Trip to Burkina Faso
programme.desc: In Burkina Faso, our heroes' penfriend Jamal can't wait to introduce Zoe and Milo to his parents, and like Alim, he appears to have several mums and dads. What a mystery!

programme.title: Three, Two, One Blast Off
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts build a three-stage rocket to send a camera high above the clouds to photograph Matariki.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Troubadours and Minstrels
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, listening to music for entertainment is a much-appreciated pastime. Singers and musicians of that era travel round Europe singing their poetry. Famous minstrel Howler is a huge hit at a fiery banquet in his lordship's court.

programme.title: Family Life in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Meet a peasant family in their daily lives, back in the Middle Ages. Dove and Howler are very busy parents! Besides educating their little urchin kids, welcoming a new baby, dealing with daily home life, life for these peasant parents is eventful to say the least!

programme.title: Building Fortified Castles
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, castles are built to protect their residents from danger. Lord Roach wants to have his castle fitted with every single type of defense system. Howle r- his architect, loves the idea. But there is something that may ruin the construction process.

programme.title: The Musical Mystery
programme.desc: Addison and her classmates are tasked with playing a piece of music written by a local billionaire, who has promised to donate funding to the school's music program – but only if Addison can solve a musical puzzle and correctly fill in the blanks in the sheet music!

programme.title: Yoko 500
programme.desc: When a competitive race gets out of control, the kids have to choose between winning at any cost or helping their friends.

programme.title: What Makes Chocolate so Tasty?
programme.desc: During roasting, a chemical reaction called the Maillard reaction changes the bitter taste of cocoa beans to the chocolate flavour we love. This reaction also creates the taste, smell and golden browning of toast, cakes, grilled and roasted meats.

programme.title: Tshavhadzimu
programme.desc: Four young adventurers travel to Tshavhadzimu in Mapungubwe National Park. They search for a cave with rock art, run into a herd of elephants and almost step on a dangerous snake.

programme.title: Building Fortified Castles
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, castles are built to protect their residents from danger. Lord Roach wants to have his castle fitted with every single type of defense system. Howle r- his architect, loves the idea. But there is something that may ruin the construction process.

programme.title: Family Life in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Meet a peasant family in their daily lives, back in the Middle Ages. Dove and Howler are very busy parents! Besides educating their little urchin kids, welcoming a new baby, dealing with daily home life, life for these peasant parents is eventful to say the least!

programme.title: Squawker Walkers
programme.desc: When Shirley finds success with a simple invention, the gang decides to create a useless product that'll sell in huge numbers. Max worries that Noodles is jumping ship to work for Shirley.

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: Overcoming Trauma
programme.desc: Xavier brings home a ravenous baby barn owl while Marisa bids farewell to the kitty that has been camping out in her shower. And Laura helps a heroic family dog overcome recent trauma with consistency, patience, and respect.

programme.title: Sound
programme.desc: Believe it or not but we all have orchestras in our closets and cabinets. In this episode Steve Spangler shows how to make wacky musical instruments from standard household items such as glasses, pipes, and cars.

programme.title: Fingerprints
programme.desc: In this episode, Dr Chris and Dr Xand look at fingerprints, and show you an experiment to catch your own criminal!

programme.title: Thinking Outside the Jam
programme.desc: In this episode Eric uses an innovative approach to get out of a sticky situation. He uses scrumptious strawberry jam on toast, lots of creative thinking and puppets to act out the problem. How can you apply Eric's techniques to your own life?

programme.title: Magic Cups
programme.desc: In this episode we teach you how to get three cups facing down in just three moves. Easy? Not at all. You start with one cup facing down and for each move you make, two of the three cups must be flipped simultaneously. Ready, set ... FLIP!

programme.title: Vocal Chords and Roller Coasters
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand find out what happens when you go on a roller coaster. Dr. Chris shows his vocal chords, and in the hospital emergency room, there's a broken elbow caused by dancing.

programme.title: Actually, It's An Estimate
programme.desc: An approximation is the nearest estimate if we don't know the exact size of something. In this episode, we learn how accurate estimates come about by using clues and information about things in our everyday lives.

programme.title: Old Math is New Again
programme.desc: In this episode we travel to ancient Egypt to explore an age-old multiplication method. How is this ancient method of multiplication, using ‘times two', similar to that used by modern computers? Eric will find out by conducting a range of fun experiments.

programme.title: Recovery
programme.desc: There is loads of donkey work down at the sanctuary, where Prince, a big stallion, needs an operation. The Junior Vets help dogs Harvey and Lois recover from their injuries with physio, swimming, and a doggy obstacle course!

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: The Musical Mystery
programme.desc: Addison and her classmates are tasked with playing a piece of music written by a local billionaire, who has promised to donate funding to the school's music program – but only if Addison can solve a musical puzzle and correctly fill in the blanks in the sheet music!

programme.title: E5 - Sloth Bear
programme.desc: Peek inside the secret world of the fearless, often misunderstood sloth bear. Travel to Sri Lanka with Max and discover how this fierce, shaggy animal fights off leopards and other deadly rivals, all while trying to secure enough protein to survive.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E6 - November-December - Full Circle
programme.desc: Witness some of the most incredible natural events in November, from the millions of Monarch butterflies that converge in Mexico’s forests to the deep fog that shrouds the city of Dubai, signalling the start of winter.

programme.title: E2 - Islands
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: E5 - Sloth Bear
programme.desc: Peek inside the secret world of the fearless, often misunderstood sloth bear. Travel to Sri Lanka with Max and discover how this fierce, shaggy animal fights off leopards and other deadly rivals, all while trying to secure enough protein to survive.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E2 - Islands
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: E5 - Sloth Bear

programme.title: E6 - November-December - Full Circle
programme.desc: Witness some of the most incredible natural events in November, from the millions of Monarch butterflies that converge in Mexico’s forests to the deep fog that shrouds the city of Dubai, signalling the start of winter.

programme.title: E2 - Islands
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: E1 - The Wilds of Winter
programme.desc: Endure winter and early spring on the west coast, where animals eke out a chilly existence. Watch red deer battle on windswept Inishvickillane, welcome seal pups amid howling storms on the Inishkea islands, and view the return of the basking sharks.

programme.title: E1 - Humpback Birth of a Giant
programme.desc: Follow the first months of a newborn humpback whale’s life in the waters off the Pacific Coast of Columbia. See how his mother nurtures him through sickness, supports his body, protects him under attack, and prepares him for an epic journey.

programme.title: E1 - Waterhole
programme.desc: Witness clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. See a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound, and a honey badger’s risky dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: E1 - The Ghost of the Mountains
programme.desc: Navigate the harsh Mongolian wilderness with Dan as he searches for The Dude, the largest snow leopard ever recorded. Watch him battle hostile landscapes and uncertainty as he sheds light on the challenges that The Dude and other snow leopards face.

programme.title: E2 - Mum's the Word
programme.desc: Get to know Fera, the Queen of the Pantanal, as she teaches her rambunctious cub Simba how to climb trees and hunt for dinner. Then learn why Ferinha, another local female, struggles with motherhood as more males move in and threaten the youngsters.

programme.title: E94 - Clarence Loves Shoopy/Missing Cat
programme.desc: When Clarence discovers that one of his neighbors is the grumpy school recess proctor Ms. Shoop, he gets a glimpse of her home life and decides the only things she's missing are some friends.

programme.title: E320 - Bamboo Warfare/Bear In The Clouds/Umbrella Tactics/Neither Yin, Nor Yang/Mechatronics
programme.desc: Grizzy dismantles the toboggan built by the Lemmings in the log cabin and reemploys the bamboo sticks to build a jacuzzi.

programme.title: E46 - The Great Veggie War/Rexford's Nectar/Grizz's Doc/Triple T Tiger Lilies
programme.desc: The bears return to the Veggie Kingdom to visit their old friend Lima, only to find the kingdom at war with a familiar yet unexpected foe. Can the bears help save the veggie kingdom from total annihilation?

programme.title: E7 - A. King Ramses Curse/Bad Hair Day/The Ride of the Valkyries/Scuba-Scuba Doo/Little Mu
programme.desc: Courage finds an ancient artefact buried outside the house.

programme.title: E449 - Scrapper's Feeding Time/Trampoline Trouble
programme.desc: Mr Bean has to feed Scrapper night and day, so invents a feeding machine using a train set.

programme.title: E13 - Dead Cute
programme.desc: An unexpected visit by Hiro's parents throws the Stitt household and the entire town into disarray. The Karutas’ arrival coincides with Charity's 16th birthday complicates matters further but not as much as the house’s utter destruction.

programme.title: E28 - Happy Bert Day
programme.desc: Ernie is throwing a surprise party for Bert and he’s feeling so excited to make it a fun day.

programme.title: E13 - Fear Of Flying
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa helps a young boy overcome his fear of flying.

programme.title: E15 - Relaxation Land
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa's relaxing weekend getaway quickly becomes a spooky nightmare for Pizza Steve.

programme.title: E9 - Poop Scoop
programme.desc: The CDMS school paper is closing down, since no one reads it, and sawdust is a cheaper option for lining the bathroom floors.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfette and the Smurfs team up with new friends to save Papa Smurf after he's kidnapped and realize their destiny is to protect the universe.

programme.title: E10 - Where To?
programme.desc: Will’s father shows up unexpectedly and tells the truth about where he’s been, exposing a long-buried lie that the adults have told Will.

programme.title: E12 - Kentucky Farewell
programme.desc: All season the chefs have been growing gardens at their Kentucky estate. Tom ambushes the sleeping chefs and challenges them to reap what they sowed and make a dish focused on their garden harvest. Then, for the last elimination challenge in Kentucky, the chefs head to Keeneland, a thoroughbred horse auction house, to bid on luxury ingredients for dishes to show gratitude to their culinary mentors. Chefs Bryan Voltaggio, Gavin Kaysen, JD Fratzke, Kim Alter, David Posey and Chris Coombs join the judges to see how far the Chefs have come and who deserves to go to Macau for the finals.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: Wow
programme.desc: The Wow series is explores the provinces of the Philippines, delving into its history, culture, natural resources, and people, developed with the support of Forest Foundation Philippines.

programme.title: Home Away From Home S5
programme.desc: a travel & lifestyle show that celebrates Filipino stories abroad as it chronicles Filipino communities all over the world and explores cultural exchanges of Pinoys in their home away from home.

E11 - Himalayan Heroes, Nepal
programme.desc: Hoping to follow in his great-aunt's footsteps, Glitch enlists the help of a sceptical Foz and a friendly yak in order to find a yeti in the Himalayas.

programme.title: E4 - Cheesy Bang Bang
programme.desc: The cheese delivery race is on as Mojo and the racer top try to deliver food faster than Filo. But the competition gets too hot when an explosive souffle is on the table!

programme.title: E14 - The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E26 - Climate Change, The Arctic Ocean
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are watching for polar bears, but an iceberg is heading for their ship!

programme.title: E4 - Andy And The Baby Humpback Whale
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Pacific ocean, off the tropical islands of Hawaii, on a baby animal mission to see how a baby humpback whale prepares for its 5000 km migration North to the rich feeding grounds of Alaska.

programme.title: E32 - Everglades National Park, Florida
programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: E33 - Football
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play, although he must think on his feet when the weather turns, and the players start getting wet.

programme.title: E18 - I Would Fly All The Way Around The World
programme.desc: Invisibility, speed, electricity, and flight, the animals share all the exciting things they would do if they had magic powers.

programme.title: E44 - Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: E45 - TV Shop
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: E45 - TV Shop
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: E11 - Himalayan Heroes, Nepal
programme.desc: Hoping to follow in his great-aunt's footsteps, Glitch enlists the help of a sceptical Foz and a friendly yak in order to find a yeti in the Himalayas.

programme.title: E9 - The Diary Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E27 - Dog Loves Fairytales
programme.desc: Dog loves books, and Dog especially loves books with fairytales in them. But this particular book of fairytales has an unlucky imp inside it.

programme.title: E22 - Alien Television
programme.desc: Aliens on OKIDO telly? Skateboarders in the satellite?! Everything's upside down! It's up to Messy and his friends to fix it!

programme.title: E23 - Comet
programme.desc: Messy has to save OKIDO from a falling comet before his bedtime! He sees that Mayor Oki still has his bath!

programme.title: E31 - Woolly Memories
programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: E32 - Beach Break
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck are spending a day at the beach, aiming to build some sand animals.

programme.title: E24 - Wagon Ride
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: E12 - The Lost Property Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels lose Tag in the Clubhouse but to find him they're going to have to figure out where the Lost Property room is.

programme.title: E14 - Bullet Train, Japan
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: E2 - Mason's Yorkshire Puddings With Sausages
programme.desc: Mason is cooking a recipe named after the place it comes from: Yorkshire. Mason serves his recipe with broccoli, and lots of gravy.

programme.title: E7 - Cassowary
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the jungles of Australia in search of a cassowary. Along the way, they meet some wild budgerigars.

programme.title: E21 - Craft Book
programme.desc: Lily finds a flight-themed book that has instructions on how to make simple aircrafts.

programme.title: E10 - Rug Island
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: E10 - Walkie Talkie
programme.desc: The veggies are playing walkie-talkie hide-and-seek, but Evil Pea steals Carrot's walkie-talkie and uses it to trick the Veggies into getting trapped by the Corn Cobs.

programme.title: Saru E343
programme.desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai to chase her dreams. Along the way, she reunites with her family and fights hard to earn her mother the respect she truly deserves.

programme.title: Bhabi Ji Ghar Par Hai! E2831
programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy, two neighboring couples, the Mishras and the Tiwaris, navigate the chaos that ensues when each husband develops a crush on the other's wife!

programme.title: Jagadhatri E163
programme.desc: Jagaddhatri, a secret crime officer, and orphan Swayambhu partner to fight crime. Only a few friends know her real identity; later, they marry happily.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile E465
programme.desc: Reet, a determined journalist, navigates the struggles of her 'atta-satta' marriage, uncovering family secrets and challenging societal norms in her quest for justice and true love.

programme.title: Bury Me High
programme.desc: This is a film about one of the practical metaphysics of the Orient - Geomancy. The Orientals believe fervently that a good burial site endows fame and fortune on its descendants. When the story begins, two geomancers are roaming Indochina's wilderness trying to find the dream grave site. They find The Conqueror, a site generating wealth and power - also a bloodbath. Nguen wants it but Wei wants no bloodbath. They have a fight. Wei escapes by the skin of his teeth. Wei rewards the poor man who saved him by finding him a good grave site. Many years later, Anna who is believed to be the daughter of the poor man, heads an American computer empire. Wei's son, Wisely, is a famous traveler. The girl asks him to go to Indochina to trace their roots...

programme.title: Anna Magdalena
programme.desc: A romantic tale about 3 young people who starts out as adversaries and blossoms into something else. When a gorgeous female moves into the building and 2 men fall in love with her.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Two Hong-Kong cops are sent to Tokyo to catch an ex-cop who stole a large amount of money in diamonds. After one is captured by the Ninja-gang protecting the rogue cop, the other one gets his old Orphanage gang, dubbed the 'Five Lucky Stars,' to help him. They don't like this much, but they do it...

programme.title: Bury Me High
programme.desc: This is a film about one of the practical metaphysics of the Orient - Geomancy. The Orientals believe fervently that a good burial site endows fame and fortune on its descendants. When the story begins, two geomancers are roaming Indochina's wilderness trying to find the dream grave site. They find The Conqueror, a site generating wealth and power - also a bloodbath. Many years later, Anna who is believed to be the daughter of the poor man, heads an American computer empire. Wei's son, Wisely, is a famous traveler. programme.title: E476
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.
NEWS ON THE HOUR: Provides live coverage of news and current affairs from around the world, bringing viewers the latest breaking news.

programme.title: E1123
programme.desc: ASIAN FINANCIAL INSIGHT: Based on the Hong Kong International Center, pay attention to the daily dynamics of the capital market and focus on hot political and economic events.

programme.title: E476
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: E166
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Oikawa Shimon, a chef who has lost everything, drifts into Tsukihate, an imaginary town where those on the brink of life mysteriously gather. There he finds Magdala-ya, a tiny diner on a cliff run by Ria Arima-a mysterious woman with a scar on the neck. Through Ria's cooking and her unconditional kindness, Shimon begins to reclaim the courage to live. Based on Harada Maha's novel, this moving drama explores sin, redemption, and the irreplaceable value of life.

programme.title: Train Driver's Cab View

programme.title: E95
programme.desc: Roshni stands firmly with her husband Raj as he chases his IAS dream. But when his betrayal breaks her trust, her life changes forever. Will she rebuild herself and fight back stronger than ever?

programme.title: E45
programme.desc: Working-class Taara and wealthy heir Yuvraaj defy class for a deep, undeniable love. But with family honour at stake, can Yuvraaj choose her over his legacy?

programme.title: E80
programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

programme.title: E5142
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: E1998
programme.desc: Anupamaa sacrifices her ambitions for family, feeling uncredited. She finds empowerment by living on her terms after trials, showcasing a dramatic journey of resilience and independence.

programme.title: E270 - 2
programme.desc: Time flew by, yet Tulsi Virani stood strong as the Sarvagunn matriarch! Can she navigate the challenges of modern-day parenting and relationships?

programme.desc: Jhanak, determined to keep her mother's vow, embarks on a life-changing path. Facing hardships and loss, she encounters a man who adds a new layer of complexity to her journey.

programme.title: E309 - The Sandman Cometh
programme.desc: When Patrick can't fall asleep, he seeks assistance from the Sandman.

programme.title: E105 - Dead Ed's
programme.desc: Jack & Lil try to prove they're the one true local, enduring a series of bizarre quests in the local dive restaurant Dead Ed's.

programme.title: E250 - Broken Alarm
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his precious alarm clock, but nothing else is loud enough to wake him up on time.

programme.title: E910 - Gags To Riches / Sole Searching
programme.desc: After Luan pranks Grouse with a fake lottery ticket, she has to deal with the consequences of his massive shopping spree. // Lynn desperately searches for a popular brand of basketball shoes after she narrowly misses out on buying a pair.

programme.title: E109 - No Friend In Sight
programme.desc: Chloe feels smothered by Max and Phoebe, and encourages them to make new friends. However, the twins unwittingly make the same friend, and begin a battle for the ages over her. Chloe's new alone time is interrupted by living room-crashing pelican.

programme.title: E211 - iGive Away a Car
programme.desc: The gang runs a contest on iCarly -- the prize is a new car courtesy of a local dealership. After Nevel wins, the kids discover that the dealership had no knowledge of the contest or the free car they were supposedly donating.

programme.title: E107 - Raph VS. Water
programme.desc: The Turtles and Mutanimals are caught in the Storm of the Century! But when a new group of SEA MUTANTS threaten the city... Raph will be forced to use his WORDS to save the day.

programme.title: E121 - The Patrick Show Sells Out / Neptune's Ball
programme.desc: The Patrick Show gets competing sponsors. // The star family visits King Neptune's palace.

programme.title: E907 - The Kanga-ruse / The Walking Bed
programme.desc: When it appears the kangaroo mascot Crikey has vandalized the school, The Action News Team tries to prove his innocence. // Lincoln finds ways to break a family rule about hand-me-downs so he can get Lori's old mattress instead of his sisters.

programme.title: E112 - Along Came a Sister / Chore and Peace
programme.desc: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes’ tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

programme.title: E504 - Strife of the Party / Kernel of Truth
programme.desc: When Lola learns that Lana is planning their joint birthday, she does everything to stop it. // Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve the mystery of the missing popcorn.

programme.title: E115 - Test Friends
programme.desc: Without them knowing, Captain Man puts Danger Force through a series of tests to see if he can trust them. But when the tests get out of hand, the tables turn on who can be trusted.

programme.title: E258 - Boss for a Day / The Goofy Newbie
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. What could go wrong? // Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he finds out the employees get free ice cream.

programme.title: E260 - Knock Knock, Who's There? / Pat Hearts Squid
programme.desc: SpongeBob watches Mr. Krabs's house while he's away, so he takes extreme measures to make sure no one breaks in. // Squidward is forced to room with Patrick, but his domineering demeanor rubs off on Patrick more than he'd like.

programme.title: E258 - Boss for a Day / The Goofy Newbie
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. What could go wrong? // Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he finds out the employees get free ice cream.

programme.title: E907 - The Kanga-ruse / The Walking Bed
programme.desc: When it appears the kangaroo mascot Crikey has vandalized the school, The Action News Team tries to prove his innocence. // Lincoln finds ways to break a family rule about hand-me-downs so he can get Lori's old mattress instead of his sisters.

programme.title: E211 - iGive Away a Car
programme.desc: The gang runs a contest on iCarly -- the prize is a new car courtesy of a local dealership. After Nevel wins, the kids discover that the dealership had no knowledge of the contest or the free car they were supposedly donating.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. programme.title: E518 - Lost Keys
programme.desc: After a family trip to a mountain beauty spot, Daddy Pig loses the car keys down a very deep drain.

programme.title: E107 - Epic Sail
programme.desc: Crusher and Pickle challenge Blaze and his friends to a sailboat race. But when he tries to cheat, Crusher accidentally crashes both ships onto a tropical island! Blaze and his crew must find the missing pieces of their ship so they can sail home.

programme.title: E705 - Pups Save A Waiter-Bot / Pups Stop A Pie-Clone
programme.desc: Mr. Porter's high tech waiter robot helps around the cafe, but it can't stop cleaning! It's up to the Pups to clean up the mess all over town! // Mayor Humdinger creates a cyclone of delicious pies! The Pups must stop it before the town is covered.

programme.title: E835 - Doctor Hamster's Big Present
programme.desc: Peppa and her family take Goldie the Fish to Doctor Hamster for her check-up. Dr Hamster wishes she could exercise more, so Grampy Rabbit decides to build something to help...

programme.title: E841 - Space Adventure!
programme.desc: Peppa and George are re-enacting the Apollo Moon Landing with the help of Granny Pig's historical re-enactment society. Grampy Rabbit has lent them his rocket, but no one has told him it's just pretend.

programme.title: E619 - Pups Save A Wrong-Way Explorer
programme.desc: Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into some crocodiles?

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: E102 - Mr Dinosaur Is Lost
programme.desc: George's favourite toy is Mr.Dinosaur. One day Mr.Dinosaur gets stuck up a tree and George thinks he is lost, so Peppa helps George find him.

programme.title: E101 - Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: It's raining and Peppa is sad because she can't go out to play. When the rain stops, Peppa feels better and she and George get ready to play one of their favorite games - jumping in mud puddles!

programme.title: E209 - The Crew Builds A Ferris Wheel / The Crew Builds A Farm Animal Yoga Space
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.title: E125 - The Crew Builds A Parking Garage / The Crew Builds A Campsite
programme.desc: The Crew helps with a parking problem when Cafe Carl's ice cream machine brings lots of cars to Builder Cove. // When Rubble's fear of the dark derails the pup's Bark Yard campout, the Crew comes up with an idea to help him enjoy the starry night.

programme.title: E202 - Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: E602 - Desert Island
programme.desc: When a fishing trip goes wrong, leaving Grandpa Pig, Granddad Dog, and Grampy Rabbit stranded on a desert island, Captain Daddy Dog is the only one able to save them.

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: E124 - Barbazoo Can't Say ''no'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: E110 - Truckball Team-Up
programme.desc: Blaze discovers an exciting new sport called Truckball. But when Crusher and his team of cronies challenge him, Blaze must scour all of Axle City to put together a Truckball team before the big game.

programme.title: E902 - Rocky's Cat-Astrophe
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger transforms his robot cat Meow-Meow into a tiger-sized metal-eating menace, the Paw Patrol calls in the Cat Pack to help stop the creature.

programme.title: E903 - Rocky's Cat-Astrophe
programme.desc: Cat-Pack members Wild and Shade team up with the Mighty Pups to stop a runaway rocket. // When the Ruff-Ruff Pack swipes a priceless golden lion mask from the museum, Shade and Wild must help the Paw Patrol to retrieve the stolen artifact

programme.title: E210 - Too Many Swipers / Bateo's Home Run
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Swiper re-join with his duplicates and make it to Grandma's picnic. / Dora and Boots help Bateo the Bat get to the baseball game in time to play.

programme.title: E843 - Mr Bull The Teacher
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle must go to the dentist so leaves the class with Mr Bull. The children already know the subjects Mr Bull suggests teaching, so he decides to show them how to fix a squeaky floorboard.

programme.title: E844 - Looking For Things
programme.desc: Mummy Pig is baking an apple pie, so Daddy Pig suggests Peppa and George play a game of looking for things. Peppa and George have fun running around the house solving the clues.

programme.title: E846 - Please And Thank You
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa talk to Peppa and George about manners. Madame Gazelle teaches all the children about how wonderful it is to say please and thank you.

programme.title: E124 - Barbazoo Can't Say ''no'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: E215 - Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: E209 - The Crew Builds A Ferris Wheel / The Crew Builds A Farm Animal Yoga Space
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: E202 - Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: E101 - Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: It's raining and Peppa is sad because she can't go out to play. When the rain stops, Peppa feels better and she and George get ready to play one of their favorite games - jumping in mud puddles!

programme.title: E102 - Mr Dinosaur Is Lost
programme.desc: George's favourite toy is Mr.Dinosaur. One day Mr.Dinosaur gets stuck up a tree and George thinks he is lost, so Peppa helps George find him.

programme.title: E124 - Barbazoo Can't Say ''no'' / The Doppelganger

programme.title: E210 - Too Many Swipers / Bateo's Home Run
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Swiper re-join with his duplicates and make it to Grandma's picnic. / Dora and Boots help Bateo the Bat get to the baseball game in time to play.

programme.title: E107 - Epic Sail
programme.desc: Crusher and Pickle challenge Blaze and his friends to a sailboat race. But when he tries to cheat, Crusher accidentally crashes both ships onto a tropical island! Blaze and his crew must find the missing pieces of their ship so they can sail home.

programme.title: E4 - Exploring Western Canada
programme.desc: In Revelstoke, Alexis and Thomas discover slackcountry skiing, a hybrid between resort and backcountry skiing. Though seemingly more accessible, slackcountry carries the same avalanche and rescue risks.

programme.desc: In Revelstoke, Alexis and Thomas discover slackcountry skiing, a hybrid between resort and backcountry skiing. Though seemingly more accessible, slackcountry carries the same avalanche and rescue risks.

programme.title: E2 - Here Is A Sloth
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Oscar ET Malika, Toujours En Retard S3
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar ET Malika, Toujours En Retard S3

programme.title: Au Pays Des Enfants Interdits
programme.desc: At the end of the 1960s, over 200,000 seasonal workers, employed without rights, arrived in Switzerland every year. Their children remained in their home countries, staying with relatives, separated from their parents. Others were brought illegally but had to live in hiding. A look back at a dark chapter in Swiss migration history.

programme.title: E25 - Vote For Leloup!
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E44 - Fib After Fib
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Falo S17
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Generation F S1
programme.desc: Fashion, food, sport, urban culture, lifestyle... The artist Richard Orlinski explores the French touch. Between Dakar, London and Montreal, he meets a new generation of creators and puts the spotlight on a bold and uninhibited French-speaking world.

programme.title: E8 - Car, Fridge, Can: Where Does Our Steel Come From?
programme.desc: How is French steel made? Hugo Clement investigates the heart of the heavy industry and reveals its little secrets. An opportunity to discover that a quarter of the greenhouse gas emissions from the French industry is linked to steel production and that this metal is recycled abroad.

programme.desc: Riley wants to rebuild her estranged relationship with her mother and little sister who is ill. But when Riley realizes her sister may not actually be as sick as she appears, Riley's mother stops at nothing to keep her daughters with her forever.

programme.title: Starship Troopers: Invasion
programme.desc: Federation outpost Fort Casey is attacked by bugs. The Alesia crew must evacuate survivors and intel. Minister Jenkins' secret mission goes awry, prompting a perilous rescue.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E4 - 周筆暢驚艷亮相
programme.desc: 每集由一位原唱歌手對抗三位金曲守護人，以自己的非主打歌與主打歌同台PK，通過現場500位大眾聽審的投票決定挑戰是否成功。原唱歌手包括任賢齊、鄭少秋、吳克群、周筆暢、鄧紫棋、李克勤、趙傳、蔡健雅、許美靜、許茹芸等。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E2 - 張一山張慧雯挑戰經典
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: E4 - Fun Facts About The World!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning fun facts all about the world! He & D.BO shrink down to meet Ernie the Eraser, an aspiring magician who teaches them the science behind how erasers work. Then, they fly into the night sky to learn how fireworks get their colors & why some animals, like raccoons, prefer to come out at night. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how to be a cowboy in the desert & helps a brave spoon protect his cereal from getting soggy!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E5 - Earth Week Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Join JJ & Cody as Earth Week nature explorers! Cody’s family goes on an autumn hike, playing in the leaves & making owl murals. Then, JJ & Cody turn a stream into a racetrack for walnut sailboats! The exploration continues as JJ captivates a butterfly, discovers tadpoles in the pond & becomes a junior scout on a camping trip. Plus, help the family rush to get the recycling out in time!

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!
programme.desc: It's Earth Week, so let's work on saving our planet! JJ's family uses his toys to show all the fun ways we can help the Earth. Learn how to sort trash into the right bins to recycle! Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden with soil, seeds & sunlight. The Earth Week fun continues with a trip through the solar system & a beautiful nature walk in the mountains!

programme.title: E7 - JJ’s Earth Week Camping Trip
programme.desc: Pack your bags for JJ’s Earth Week camping trip! Experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo show JJ how to do classic outdoor activities. Then, take a nature walk with Bingo to collect fun facts in a scrapbook! The outdoor learning continues as the class harvests vegetables from the garden, counts apples at the farm & discovers the magic of composting to feed the earth!

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!
programme.desc: It's Earth Week, so let's work on saving our planet! JJ's family uses his toys to show all the fun ways we can help the Earth. Learn how to sort trash into the right bins to recycle! Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden with soil, seeds & sunlight. The Earth Week fun continues with a trip through the solar system & a beautiful nature walk in the mountains!

programme.title: E5 - Small Wonders of Earth Week
programme.desc: Blippi explores the small wonders of Earth Week! He shrinks down to meet a friendly ant colony on a mission to find food. Then, he learns why flies love garbage trucks & meets a singing worm in the mud! The tiny adventures continue as Blippi discovers how spiders make webs, helps a blue jay rebuild its nest & flies inside a beehive to see how honey is made!

programme.title: E7 - JJ’s Earth Week Camping Trip

programme.title: E2 - Little Problems, Big Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are turning little problems into big adventures! When Mr. Vanderboos accidentally sprays hair growth serum on Daddy, Officer Freeze mistakes him for a hairy monster, & a wild chase begins! Then, Mila has a bad cold, but she still has to help Morphle figure out the right morphs to rescue a dog stuck in a tree. From playing a quiet game to avoid waking a napping neighbor to playing hide & seek with friends, every little problem is a big adventure!

programme.title: E104
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E8 - Agricultural Show/Sashes/Winter Olympics/Waterloo
programme.desc: In the line-up: the Paris International Agricultural Show opens its doors; a focus on how mayors' sashes are made; popular enthusiasm in French ski resorts for the Winter Olympic Games; miniature reconstruction of the Battle of Waterloo...

Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E11 - Gers, From Village To Village
programme.desc: A picture postcard of the Gascony countryside, the Gers, with its vineyards and verdant landscapes, is a ''big garden'', rich in agriculture and livestock. The birthplace of d'Artagnan and Armagnac, Gascon traditions and cuisine live on in this land of history and culture.

programme.title: E11 - Ursula Caruel/Tree Embolism/Langres Landscape
programme.desc: Contents: Ursula Caruel, an artist inspired by the herbarium, for a local and nomadic art form; tree embolism; the landscapes of the Langres plateau; Don't panic with Marie-Laure.

programme.title: E26 - Colourful And Aesthetic Transformation
programme.desc: Just a stone's throw from the banks of the Meuse, we visit a beautifully converted family home. We're also off to discover the Nhow Hotel in Brussels, in the Botanique district.

E15
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: Fly Me to The Saitama – FROM BIWA LAKE WITH LOVE
programme.desc: A live-action film adaptation of Mineo Maya's “Fly Me to the Saitama” turned out to be a huge, unexpected box office hit of 2019. With the producers who took the demand for a sequel as real, the cast and crew got back together to complete the second chapter of the urban legend in Fly Me To The Saitama -FROM BIWA LAKE WITH LOVE-. In addition to the biting yet affectionate dissing of Saitama and the Kanto region in the first film, the sequel contains an even more scathing dissing of the Kansai region. Alongside costars GACKT and Fumi Nikaido, Ryo Kato and Tsubasa Masuwaka reprise their roles as members of the Saitama Liberation Front. A crucial protagonist who joins their battle, Kai Kikyo, the handsome leader of the Shiga Liberation Front, is played by Anne in her first role as male character. Akira Kashoji, the ruthless governor of Osaka and kingpin of the Kansai region who stands in the way of Rei and others, is played by Ainosuke Kataoka. In addition to Norika Fujiwara and
